WITNESS ACCOUNT
I was walking on the north side of the intersection and heard braking before seeing the two vehicles make contact. The
impact appeared to involve the front left side of the dark sedan. Both drivers exited their vehicles and spoke calmly.
ADDITIONAL OBSERVATIONS
Traffic was light. Visibility was adequate under street lighting. I did not observe any person leave the scene and did not
see an injury. This witness and statement are entirely fictional and intended only for application testing.
DECLARATION
Electronically acknowledged by Taylor Sample on 2026-05-12.
